title: clinopodium lanatum
intro: Clinopodium lanatum, also known as Mountain Mint or Woolly Mint, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of North America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium lanatum include soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and reducing pain and inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Clinopodium lanatum can be prepared in various ways, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate a range of health issues.
